title: lavandula stoechas subsp. stoechas
intro: Lavandula stoechas subsp. stoechas, also known as the Spanish lavender or top lavender, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Lavandula stoechas subsp. stoechas include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and digestive problems. Lavandula stoechas subsp. stoechas can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or dried flowers for use in potpourri and other herbal remedies.
